text:
Meet Charlie. Charlie loved ice cream. He had this ritual where every Thursday he went to the Frozen Treasures shop. Inside was a treasure trove of treats. There was strawberry sundae. His heart raced.

He’d buy four scoops - vanilla one for his palette, chocolate swirls for fun, rocky path blend because that smelled nice, and rocky road pure ecstasy because that was his jam.

He’d sit, indulge, and fantasize about tomorrow. He’d dream about creating snow cones. The shopkeeper knew his habits well.

One day, Charlie felt sad. Something was off. He started with just one cone. It wasn’t enough. Soon he’d buy ten.

Then twenty. People chuckled.

Then something weird happened. Charlie started laughing. He didn’t know why. Maybe it was silly. Maybe it was fun.

He spun cones. He made snow angels. Friends joined in. It was magical.

That’s all it took. Charlie’s ice cream adventures became legendary.
